versions.version_description: Capo on first fret with simplified, open chords.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
THE BIGGEST PART OF ME

transcription and chart
Peter Kruger
casparus60@yahoo.com

A great pop tune from the 
early 80's

best to 'get the timing'
when first played along with recording
a few times

|[ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]      |[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]      |[ch]Cm7-5/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]     |[ch]Em7-5/Bb[/ch]  [ch]F11[/ch]   |

 All my  life) I've been hopin' you would find me[/tab]
